name_en: M24433 Pink. This Speedy Bandoulière 25 Monogram Leather handbag is made of soft calfskin, recreating the sophisticated look of canvas prints with the Monogram pattern. Glowing metal hardware, lambskin lining, and a plaque together attest to Creative Director Pharrell Williams' relentless pursuit of details. 25 x 15 x 15cm (Length x Height x Width)
